description: Establish a core peering link with another campfire node. Core peering enables direct message relay, membership management, and epoch key distribution between nodes. Requires operator level 2 (contactable) to ensure accountability for participants in the core relay infrastructure.

args.name: peer_key
args.description: Ed25519 public key of the peer node

args.name: peer_endpoint
args.description: Transport endpoint URL of the peer node

args.name: transport
args.description: Transport protocol used to reach the peer
